title: Confectionery
description: A semi-in-depth candy and baking mod!
body:
**[THIS MOD IS IN ALPHA! LOTS OF CONTENT IS HERE ALREADY BUT MUCH MORE WILL BE ADDED BEFORE RELEASE!]**
This mod adds lots of candy with various effects, and a baking system. 
# **Features:**
- Candies with various effects
- Pies and Pie Slices
- Cookies
- Better Baking
- Marshmallows
- A small economy system (shop block)
- Caramel
- and more!
# **Planned Features:**
- More deco blocks
- More pies
- Even better baking
- UI fixes
